get.summary: Return a chronological list of Financial Batches.
get.description: Uses either a specific batch (recommended) or timestamp as a starting point. This method would typically be used in conjunction with subsequent calls to Sa.Export.Finance.Batch for each BatchID returned for the purposes of importing financial data into a 3rd-party accounting sytem. Server time information is also returned, specifically the current date/time ServerTime and GMT bias ServerGmtBias.

EngagementScores.title: EngagementScores
EngagementScores.description:
This calculates and stores a score for the member based to evaluate their engagement level. Likes, Posts, Comments, etc.
    Each engagement action is given a scored based on internal system settings.
